name: ordin
description: Run workflows with structure, order, and control across AI runtimes.

scripts.deps:graph: { echo '```mermaid'; depcruise --config dependency-cruiser.config.cjs --output-type mermaid src; echo '```'; } > docs/ARCHITECTURE-graph.md
scripts.fixture:setup: rm -rf .scratch/target-repo && mkdir -p .scratch && cp -R test/fixtures/target-repo-template .scratch/target-repo && git -C .scratch/target-repo init -q && git -C .scratch/target-repo add -A && git -C .scratch/target-repo -c user.email=fixture@local -c user.name=fixture commit -q -m 'init fixture target repo' && echo 'Fixture repo ready at .scratch/target-repo'
